prepare-media-transparency-report.error-login-message: Please log in to use this functionality.

notifications.description-api-error: Failed to fetch the submissions from the API.
notifications.description-csv-header-error: The CSV file doesn't have the all required fields.
notifications.description-csv-parse-error: The uploaded file doesn't appear to be a valid CSV file. Please check the file and try again.
notifications.description-export-partial-success: Exported {{filteredSubmissionCount}} submissions, but {{missingSujetLinksCount}} are missing a sujet link.
notifications.description-export-success: Successfully exported {{filteredSubmissionCount}} submissions with sujet links.
notifications.description-no-csv-to-export-error: No CSV file to export. You have to upload the CSV file from RTR.
notifications.description-no-files-error: There are no files for the period "{{period}}" in category "{{category}}".

report-status.missing-links_one: {{count}} submission is missing a sujet link
report-status.missing-links_other: {{count}} submissions are missing a sujet link
report-status.ready: The report is ready to download.
report-status.rows-found_one: Found {{count}} row in the RTR CSV file
report-status.rows-found_other: Found {{count}} rows in the RTR CSV file
report-status.submissions-found_one: {{count}} submission matches the category "{{category}}" and period "{{period}}"
report-status.submissions-found_other: {{count}} submissions match the category "{{category}}" and period "{{period}}"
